name: L.G. Financing
description_short: Tampa, FL buy-here-pay-here used car dealership offering in-house auto financing on pre-owned vehicles priced from $2,499, targeting credit-challenged buyers.
description_long:
L.G. Financing & Auto Sales LLC is a used car dealership located at 13518 N Florida Ave in Tampa, Florida. Operating Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 7 PM (Sundays by appointment), the business combines vehicle sales with in-house financing, functioning as a buy-here-pay-here (BHPH) dealership. The company appears to be a small, owner-operated business, as evidenced by its Gmail-based contact address and single physical location.

The dealership carries pre-owned inventory spanning 19 vehicle makes, with Ford (22 vehicles), Toyota (15), Chevrolet (11), and Mercedes-Benz (8) representing the largest segments. Price points range from $2,499 up to call-for-price, with dedicated browse categories for vehicles under $5K, $10K, $15K, and $20K. Customers can apply for credit directly through the website, and inventory can be filtered by make, model, body type, and price range. The dealership's physical address and listed phone number (813-727-6562) confirm it operates as a brick-and-mortar location.

What distinguishes L.G. Financing from larger franchise dealerships is its apparent focus on budget and entry-level inventory — a substantial share of its listed vehicles fall under $5,000, with mileage often ranging from 84,000 to 199,000 miles. The online credit application and willingness to work with buyers across the credit spectrum suggests this functions as an accessible option for consumers who have been declined by traditional auto lenders or banks.

From a consumer finance perspective, this listing requires an important caveat: L.G. Financing is fundamentally a used car dealership, not a personal loan provider. No loan terms, interest rates, APR ranges, or credit score thresholds are disclosed anywhere on the website. Consumers seeking debt consolidation loans, emergency cash, or credit-building products will not find those services here. Shoppers should be aware that BHPH dealerships typically charge significantly higher interest rates than banks or credit unions, and total vehicle cost of ownership can be substantially higher than the sticker price.
pros: Inventory spans 19 vehicle makes with 90+ listed vehicles
Entry-level vehicles available from $2,499 — accessible for very tight budgets
In-house credit application available directly on the website
Open six days a week (Mon–Sat, 10 AM–7 PM); Sunday appointments available
Browse by price range (under $5K, $10K, $15K, $20K) makes budgeting easy
Physical Tampa location enables in-person inspection before purchase
Multiple body types available: sedan, SUV, hatchback, pickup, coupe, cab chassis
cons: No APR, loan terms, or financing costs disclosed anywhere on the website
Not a consumer finance company — limited strictly to in-house auto purchase financing
Much of the inventory carries 100,000–199,000+ miles, raising reliability concerns
Gmail contact address and single location suggest limited customer support infrastructure
No credit score requirements, approval criteria, or down payment expectations listed
best_for: Tampa-area buyers with poor or no credit who need in-house auto financing
Consumers on a strict budget seeking a vehicle under $5,000
Buyers who have been declined by traditional banks or credit unions for an auto loan
Shoppers who prefer to inspect inventory in person before applying for credit
diagnosis: L.G. Financing is a small buy-here-pay-here used car dealership in Tampa, FL — best suited for credit-challenged local buyers who need an affordable vehicle with in-house financing and cannot qualify through a traditional lender. It is not a personal loan provider or general consumer finance company; consumers seeking cash loans, debt relief, or credit products should look elsewhere in this directory. The absence of disclosed financing terms means buyers must inquire directly about APR and total cost before committing.
services: Inventory search by make, model, body type, and price range
Vehicle browsing by body type (sedan, SUV, hatchback, pickup, coupe, cab chassis)
Contact form for inquiries and scheduling
